title: Wellness Exams & Preventive Care
excerpt: Annual and bi-annual checkups with vaccinations, parasite prevention, and life-stage guidance. Regular visits are the best way to catch problems early and keep your pet healthy long-term.

seo.title: Pet Wellness Exams in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Wellness exams, vaccines, prevention, and life-stage care for dogs and cats at VMC Fort Thomas and Independence.

acf.intro: Preventive care helps pets stay comfortable and helps families catch concerns before they become emergencies.

title: Dental Care & COHAT Cleanings
excerpt: Professional dental cleanings under anesthesia, oral health assessments, and extractions when needed. Dental disease affects most pets by age three — early care makes a real difference.

seo.title: Pet Dental Care in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Veterinary dental cleanings, oral assessments, and treatment planning for dogs and cats in Northern Kentucky.

acf.intro: Dental care protects comfort, appetite, and long-term health for dogs and cats.

title: Soft Tissue Surgery
excerpt: Spays, neuters, mass removals, and other common procedures with thorough anesthesia monitoring and clear post-op instructions. We follow up to make sure recovery goes smoothly.

seo.title: Pet Soft Tissue Surgery in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Spays, neuters, mass removals, and common soft tissue procedures with careful monitoring and recovery support.

acf.intro: Our surgical care emphasizes preparation, safety, comfort, and communication.

title: Behavior Consultations
excerpt: Anxiety, aggression, litter box issues, and stress-related behavior often have medical roots. We help identify the cause and build a practical plan — for both dogs and cats.

seo.title: Pet Behavior Consultations in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Support for anxiety, aggression, litter box issues, stress behaviors, and practical next steps.

acf.intro: Behavior care starts by listening carefully and looking for both medical and environmental factors.

title: Urgent Care During Clinic Hours
excerpt: When something comes up that can't wait, our team sees urgent cases during regular hours at both locations. Call first so we can prepare and give you guidance on the way in.

seo.title: Urgent Care Vet in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Call VMC for urgent veterinary concerns during regular clinic hours at Fort Thomas and Independence.

acf.intro: If your pet is sick or injured, call so our team can help determine the safest next step.

title: Cat-Friendly Appointments
excerpt: Feline-only appointment windows at select times, with a quieter environment and handling techniques designed specifically for cats. Less stress, better exams.

seo.title: Cat-Friendly Vet in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Low-stress feline appointments for cats in Northern Kentucky at VMC.

highlights: Practical advice for travel and home care
acf.intro: Cats deserve thoughtful care that respects their stress signals and unique needs.
